message:
feat(core): skip WAL post-commit backfill for :memory: databases

In-memory databases have no external WAL file, so post-commit WAL
auto-checkpointing is pure write-path overhead on hot autocommit loops.
Early-return from the backfill path when path == ":memory:".

Update two checkpoint-related tests to use on-disk tempfile databases
instead of :memory:, since the checkpoint behavior being tested only
applies to file-backed connections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
